chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Transfer Appl. No.32 of 2025 Date Order with signature of the Judge 1. For hearing of case. 2. For hearing of MA 5115/2025. 28.04.2025. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, a/w Zeeshan Asad, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG. = Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri, advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1 and has recorded no objection to this application. Learned Addl. P.G. has also recorded no objection. With consent, this application is allowed. Spl. Cases No.91 and 92 arising out of FIRs No.12/2014 U/s 302, 109,114, 34 PPC r/w section 7 ATA of P.S. GOR Hyderabad and 55/2014 u/s 23-A, 24 and 25 of Sindh Arms Act, 2013 of P.S. Jamshoro alongwith applications filed therein are withdrawn from the file of learned Anti-terrorism Court No.II, Karachi on the ground that the court is lying vacant and transferred to learned Anti- terrorism Court No.XXI, Karachi for expeditious disposal in accordance with law. The Cr. Transfer Application stands disposed of alongwith listed application. JUDGE A.K
